summary: Invoice Entry Record Payment feature fully tested. All 16 backend API tests passed. Frontend UI verified - Record Payment modal, payment status badges, payment history, and delete protection all working correctly.

issues: Minor: Missing aria-describedby for DialogContent (accessibility warning in console)

passed_tests: POST /api/auth/local-login - Login successful
GET /api/projects - Returns list of projects
GET /api/accounting/accounts - Returns list of accounts with balances
POST /api/finance/execution-ledger - Create credit invoice entry with payment_status=unpaid
GET /api/finance/execution-ledger/{id} - Returns invoice with payment tracking fields
POST /api/finance/execution-ledger/{id}/record-payment - Partial payment recorded successfully
Cashbook entry auto-created with system_generated=true and source_module=invoice_ledger
Liability auto-created for credit purchase with remaining balance
Invoice payment_status changed to 'partial' after partial payment
POST /api/finance/execution-ledger/{id}/record-payment - Final payment recorded
Invoice payment_status changed to 'paid' after full payment
Liability status changed to 'closed' after full payment
Overpayment correctly rejected with 400 error
DELETE blocked for invoices with payments
Payment status filter returns correct entries
Frontend: Record Payment modal opens with invoice summary
Frontend: Payment form shows all required fields (Amount, Date, Mode, Account)
Frontend: Payment status badges (Unpaid/Partial/Paid) displayed correctly
Frontend: Pay button visible on unpaid invoices
Frontend: Delete button hidden for invoices with payments
Frontend: Payment history visible when expanding invoice
critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: Record Payment endpoint correctly creates Cashbook entry with system_generated=true
VERIFIED: Liability auto-created for credit purchases with partial payments
VERIFIED: Payment status tracking (unpaid/partial/paid) working correctly
VERIFIED: Delete protection for invoices with payments implemented
VERIFIED: Payment history displayed in expanded invoice view
MINOR: DialogContent missing aria-describedby (accessibility improvement suggested)
seed_data_creation: Multiple TEST_Payment_Vendor invoices created during testing. These have payments recorded and cannot be deleted.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Invoice Entry Record Payment feature fully implemented and tested. Key features verified: 1) Record Payment modal with invoice summary, 2) Auto-create Cashbook entry with system_generated=true, 3) Auto-create/update Liability for credit purchases, 4) Payment status tracking (unpaid/partial/paid), 5) Payment history on invoices, 6) Delete protection for invoices with payments. Test project: proj_17942869 (sharan - Interior Project). Test invoices created with TEST_Payment_Vendor prefix.
